response.justification: Strong full-stack engineering background with ~15 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the resume lacks the recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, cloud strategy depth, and director-level individual contributor scope this Principal role demands.
strengths: Broad 15-year engineering track record across web, mobile, embedded
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Founder of an open-source platform showing entrepreneurial drive
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale or recognized AI expertise
Limited cloud strategy and large-org technical leadership signal
Title and scope (Senior/Staff IC) below Principal/Director-level expectations

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
Long, diverse engineering tenure with recent AI tooling work
